She wants to decide whether to change her working hours today based on these stats. The goal is to figure out if adjusting her work schedule could help improve her rankings in distance, earnings, and orders.

Hmm, so let's think about why she might be at 29th. Maybe the time slots she's choosing aren't as busy or high-demand. If more riders are active during certain times, that could affect how many orders she gets. Or perhaps she's not covering the right areas where there's higher demand.

Another angle: working longer hours doesn't necessarily mean more earnings. Sometimes, peak times have higher demand but also more competition. So, efficiency is key. Maybe she's not taking advantage of the busiest periods when orders come in faster.

The number of orders received is also 29th, which suggests that she might be getting a moderate number of orders, but not enough to push her higher.

So, the idea is to tweak her working hours to maximize her presence during peak demand times when more orders are placed. That could mean starting earlier or ending later, depending on when the rush happens in her area.

If she starts at 7 AM and ends at 6 PM, that's an extra hour in the morning which might help capture early orders without too much competition yet. Alternatively, if she works from 8 AM to 7 PM, she'd have an extra hour in the evening when dinner deliveries are booming.

I think starting a bit earlier could give her an edge in getting more orders and increasing her earnings. So maybe adjusting her start time to 7:00 and ending at 18:00 (6 PM) as before. Or perhaps even starting later but working longer if the evening is busier.

Alternatively, maybe the town has different peak times. Maybe mornings are slower but evenings are really busy. So starting a bit later and working until 7 PM could help her get more orders in higher demand periods.

I need to balance between getting more hours to potentially earn more but also ensuring that those extra hours are during times when there's actual demand. Otherwise, she might just be out there without enough orders, which doesn't help her earnings or rankings.

So, considering all this, I think adjusting her work hours to start earlier or end later could improve her stats. Maybe starting at 7 AM and ending at 18:00 (6 PM) would give her an extra hour in the morning when some riders might not be as active yet, allowing her to grab more orders.

Alternatively, if she's already working until 6 PM, maybe pushing it to 7 PM could help capture evening demand. But I have to make sure that she doesn't get too tired or that the town's demand actually peaks later.

Wait, but her riding distance was already 29th. If she works longer hours, maybe that would increase her distance as she covers more ground over time, which might help her ranking in that category too.

So, putting it all together, changing her working hours to start earlier or end later could give her the edge she needs to improve her rankings. Since starting earlier at 7 AM and ending at 18:00 (6 PM) was one thought, but another option is keeping the same start time but working longer until 7 PM.

I think extending the shift by an hour in the evening makes more sense because dinner deliveries are usually higher volume. So, she should work from 8 AM to 7 PM today.
